title: Pinalia truncata
taxonomy: Pinalia truncata is classified within the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. This plant belongs to the genus Pinalia, which is a group of terrestrial orchids. The specific classification of Pinalia truncata is as follows: Kingdom: Plantae, Clade: Angiosperms, Clade: Monocots, Order: Asparagales, Family: Orchidaceae, Subtribe: Coelogyneinae, Genus: Pinalia, Species: P. truncata. The classification of Pinalia truncata is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic analysis. By understanding its classification, botanists and researchers can better understand the relationships between different species of plants.

intro: Pinalia truncata, also known as the Pinalia orchid, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the orchid family (Orchidaceae). This plant is valued for its traditional medicinal uses, which include treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, thanks to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Pinalia truncata include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
